opportunities.title: CVE-2026-58644: The SharePoint Zero-Day That Went From Disclosure to Exploitation in Days
opportunities.why_now: CISA just added the actively-exploited SharePoint RCE to its KEV catalog, and Hacker News confirms attackers moved almost immediately after disclosure.
opportunities.angle: Rapid-exploitation timeline breakdown with patch-now urgency and KEV deadline countdown

opportunities.title: Inc Ransomware Is Already Inside Your SonicWall: The SMA Zero-Day Nobody Patched in Time
opportunities.why_now: Dark Reading reports active ransomware exploitation of SonicWall SMA zero-days, a classic edge-device breach vector.
opportunities.angle: Threat-actor profile + technical breakdown of SMA zero-day chain, tied to broader 'perimeter appliances are the new soft underbelly' narrative

opportunities.title: Coca-Cola's Fairlife Line Goes Dark: Ransomware Just Stopped Milk Production
opportunities.why_now: SecurityWeek confirms Coca-Cola suspended US Fairlife production due to a ransomware attack, a rare name-brand OT/manufacturing disruption.
opportunities.angle: Breach-impact digest: what happens when ransomware hits physical production lines, with lessons for OT/ICS convergence

opportunities.title: CISA's Patch Order on FortiSandbox: What It Means When Attackers Beat the Fix
opportunities.why_now: CISA issued a formal patch directive after attackers were already exploiting critical FortiSandbox flaws in the wild.
opportunities.angle: Patch-cadence explainer: directive text, CVE details, and countdown to federal compliance deadline

opportunities.title: GoldenEyeDog and the DigiCert Breach: When Code-Signing Certificates Get Stolen
opportunities.why_now: Hacker News links a new threat subgroup to the DigiCert breach and code-signing cert theft, a supply-chain trust nightmare.
opportunities.angle: Threat-actor deep dive on downstream supply-chain risk from stolen signing certs, with detection/verification guidance for defenders
